title: Global Awards Timeline
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU’s global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU's campus in New York City.
text:
Global Awards Timeline
Freshman Year
Clinton Global Initiative University (CGIU)
Critical Language Scholarships*
Echoing Green Fellowship for Social Entrepreneurship
Future Global Leaders
Fulbright US-UK Summer Institutes*
ILF Civic Fellowship for Asian Pacific American Leaders*
NYU Reynolds/D-Prize Online Social Venture Business Competition
Rangel International Affairs Program: Summer Enrichment Program*
Global Education and Leadership Development Programme Leaders Forum, India
YSEALI Academic Fellows and Grants (ASEAN member states - check eligibility by country)
Sophomore Year
Boren Awards for International Study*
Clinton Global Initiative University (CGIU)

Fulbright US-UK Summer Institutes*

Teach and Learn in Korea (TaLK)
Global Education and Leadership Development Programme Leaders Forum, India

Udall Scholarship* (environment or American tribal public health)
YSEALI Academic Fellows and Grants (ASEAN member states - check eligibility by country)

Senior Year

Churchill Scholarship*
